headline: Ecolab Details $4.75B CoolIT Deal, Targets Q3 2026 Close and 20%+ Margins by 2027
summary: Ecolab (NYSE:ECL) detailed its planned acquisition of direct-to-chip liquid cooling provider CoolIT Systems on a conference call, outlining the deal terms, expected timing, and how management believes the transaction strengthens the company’s long-term growth and margin profile. Deal terms and time

headline: How The Ecolab (ECL) Narrative Is Shifting On Pricing Power And CoolIT Deal Risks
summary: Ecolab’s consensus fair value has been tweaked, moving from US$321.86 to US$320.43, a small reset that still keeps attention on how pricing and execution views are evolving. That modest adjustment lines up with a mixed analyst backdrop, where some firms are more upbeat on pricing power and cash generation while others are dialing back targets over valuation, deal terms, and execution risk. Read on to see what is driving these shifts and how to track the next moves in the Ecolab story. Analyst...
